titleStmt.title: SII 27.167: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 167. (A.R. No. 503 of 1928-29.) PERDŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab (No. 2) set up in the prākāra of Vīrabhadra temple.
This record is dated Śaka 1440 (expired), (1441 current) Pramāthi, Jyēshṭha śu. 15, Saturday, lunar eclipse corresponding to 1519 A.D., May 14. The month was Adhika-Jyashṭha.

It registers a grant of 180 Varāha-gadyānas being the value of 300 mūḍe of paddy due from the village Perdūru situated in Baṁdaṁpaḷi-nāḍu of Bārakūru-rājya, to god Anantadēva of that place, for the, prosperity and welfare of the king, by Vijayappa-voḍeya, son of Ratnappa-voḍaya, who was governing Bārakūru-rājya. Of the amount endowed 120 Varāha-gadyāṇas were set apart for expenses towards worship, offering etc., in the temple while the remaining 60 gadyānas were given for the maintenance of Sūrappa-adhikāri, son of Sakappa-adhikāri of Bhāradvāja-gōtra and Ṛik-śākhā who was made responsible for the regular conduct of worship in the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī gaṇādhipatayēṁ namaḥ śrī sarasvatyāyē namaḥ śrī gurubhyōṁ namaḥ nirvighnama
stu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmara cāravē . trayilōkya nagarāraṁbha mū
lastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruśa 1440
saṁdu nālvata Oṁdaneya vartamāna pramādhi saṁvatsarada jyēṣṭa śudha 15 śalu śrīmna
mahārājādhirāja rāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra kruṣṇarāya mahārāya
ru vijayanagarada siṁhāsanadalu cittayisi samasta duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭa pratipālaneyāgi
sakalavarnadharmāśrayavanu pratipālisuttayiha kāladali Ārāyaru bārakūra rā
jyavanu ratunappa Oḍeyarige pālisi Avara kumāra vijayappa Oḍeyaru rājyavanāḷuva
kāladalu Ā vijayappa Oḍeyaru śrī kruṣṇarāya mahārāyarige śatrukṣaya mitrō
rjita Āyurārōgya Ayiśvariyābhivruddhiyāgabēkeṁdu peraḍūra Anantadēvara Amruta
paḍi naṁdādīpti paṁca parvacatra śrī bali saha naḍavadake koṭa dānapaṭṭa śilāsāśada kra
maveṁteṁdare bārakūra rājyada bhaṁḍārasthaḷada hiriUru baṁdaṁpaḷiya nāḍa Oḷaga
ṇa peraḍūra grāmadiṁda teṟuvamuḍi 200 kaṁ muḍi 1 kaṁ ghaṭṭavaraha ga ¢ 1 lkedalū
varaha ga 120 Ākṣaradalū nūṟayippattunu sōmōparāga puṇyakāladalu kuḷava
nu kaḍidu vijayappa Oḍeyaru śrī Anaṁta dēvarige Amrutapaḍi naṁdādīpti catra paṁ
caparva śrībalisaha naḍeyabēkeṁdu dhāreya neṟidu koṭeU rujuśākhe
ya bhāradvāja gōtrada saṁkappa Adhikārigaḷa maga sūrappagaḷige Ā peraḍūra grāmadiṁ
dalu muḍi 100ke muḍi 1 kaṁ varahaga 1¢1 lkedalu ghaṭṭivaga 60 nu dhāreyaneṟa
du koṭṭeU . Ubhayaṁ muḍi 300 kke varahagha ga 180 Akṣāradalu nūṟa Eṁ
bhattuvarahanu kālakālake tappade naḍasikoṁḍu baharu Eṁdu vijayappa
voḍeru śrī Anaṁtadēvarigū sūrappagū sōmōparāga puṁṇyakāladallu dhāreya
neṟadu koṭṭeU yi hoṁnanu tegadukoṁḍu śrī Anaṁtadēvara Amrutapaḍi
naṁdādīpti catra śrībali paṁcaparvanu naḍasikoṁḍu sarvamānyavāgi caṁdrārkka sthā
yigaḷāgi sukhadalu Anubhavisikoṁḍu baharu yi Ajanira grāmadōḷage Uḷanidhi
nikṣēpa jalapāśāṇa Akṣiyagama sidhasādhya yi Aṣṭabhōga svāmyavanu Anu
bhavisikoṁḍu bahiriyeṁdu vijeyappa Oḍeyaru śrī Anaṁta dēvarigū
sūrapa Adhikārigaḷigū dhāreyaneṟadu koṭa śilāśāsana . yinūṟa Eṁbha
tu varamānana kālakālakke tapade naḍasikoṁḍu Ādharoḷage Aṟuvatuvarahānu sūrapa
Adhikārigaḷu tekoṁḍu dēhārava yiśidare paṁcamahāāgyanu naḍapikoṁḍu su
khadalu yi hanu yi haṁnoṁdu muṁnūṟu sūrapanu le pike Oṁdāgi bāḷudu
yi dharmake Aḷupidare vāraṇāsiyali sāvira kapilekoṁda pāpayi Ānaṁtaṁge
tapidōru yī śilāśāsanake Urā hannoṁdu mūnūṟu baḷisāvira sayi
ha gade surāla toḷahara mu . dilava rōdhiyavaru yi nālvara sākṣiyiṁ
bārakūra karaṇika mallarasara baraha vijayappa voḍeyara voppa śrī vītarāga
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāśrēyōnu pālanaṁ . dānāsvarga mavāpnōti pā
lanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrī Anaṁta śrī śrī śrī muṁnūṟa
muḍi vilara Appaṇe pāya Anira grāma
koṭaru barasalnā Eṁdu barada śāsanā
viyarū
mūlavāgi koṭadu
Digital edition of SII 27.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
